Contents

  • Terminally Deprecated

  • Terminally Deprecated Elements
    Element
    Description
    global.thalion.ttio.providers.StorageProvider.nativeHandle()
    Scheduled for removal at v1.0. M43-M45 eliminated every internal caller; external callers should migrate to the StorageGroup / StorageDataset protocol. See docs/api-stability-v0.8.md §6.
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    global.thalion.ttio.providers.StorageProvider.nativeHandle()
    Scheduled for removal at v1.0. M43-M45 eliminated every internal caller; external callers should migrate to the StorageGroup / StorageDataset protocol. See docs/api-stability-v0.8.md §6.
  • Deprecated Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    global.thalion.ttio.Enums.Compression._RESERVED_10
    Codec id 10 reserved — never shipped.
    global.thalion.ttio.Enums.Compression._RESERVED_8
    Codec id 8 (NAME_TOKENIZED v1) removed in the v1.0 reset. Slot retained as a placeholder so subsequent ordinals match the on-disk wire format.
    global.thalion.ttio.Enums.Compression._RESERVED_9
    Codec id 9 (REF_DIFF v1) removed in the v1.0 reset. Slot retained as a placeholder so subsequent ordinals match the on-disk wire format.
    global.thalion.ttio.Enums.Precision._RESERVED_INT8
    never use directly; reserved for future extension.
